problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeDispatchAdmissionWitness defines the future dispatch admission boundary, but active TemporalLeaseWindowReceipt evidence still needs a schema-backed admission witness before any runtime worker dispatch can be enabled.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerActiveRuntimeLeaseAdmissionWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream runtime dispatch admission witness and lease preflight artifact

the witness requires live TemporalLeaseWindowReceipt evidence with lease_active status, active lease_state, non-empty fencing token, positive sequence, trusted runtime clock, UAO admission, Phi_gov authorization, WorkerFailureReceipt obligation, and effect reconciliation

the witness keeps active runtime lease observation, active lease admission, runtime dispatch admission, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, filesystem writes, connector calls, success claims, and terminal closure denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing live input refs, admission drift, malformed payloads, and summary drift
non_goals: do not observe a live TemporalLeaseWindowReceipt
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
runtime dispatch remains blocked until active lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, WorkerFailureReceipt, and effect reconciliation evidence exist
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
evidence_required: upstream runtime dispatch admission witness validation
